result.summary: The page mostly renders correctly, but several horizontal sections look clipped on the right edge, making the layout feel broken on smaller widths.

issues.description: Game card rows in both "BetRivers Exclusive Games" and "Top Played New Games" are cut off on the right side, with the third card only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Fix the responsive grid or carousel overflow so cards fit cleanly within the viewport, or make the horizontal scrolling behavior explicit and consistent.

issues.description: The top category strip is also clipped on the right, with the "Hot Games" pill only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Add proper spacing/padding or enable a clear horizontal scroll area so category buttons are fully accessible.
